tsc.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json — 0 errors. src/sw.ts excluded via tsconfig.app.json exclude array (compiled separately by vite-plugin-pwa esbuild pipeline).

build.evidence: NODE_ENV=production npm run build — PWA v1.2.0 injectManifest active, src/sw.ts compiled to dist/sw.js (49K / 8.71KB gzip), __WB_MANIFEST injected with 392 precache entries. No terser renderChunk hang. Built in 6.66s (main) + 171ms (SW).

build-gate.evidence: tsc exit 0; npm run build (NODE_ENV=production) exit 0. PWA v1.2.0 injectManifest strategy confirmed active. dist/sw.js generated (49K). dist/index.html intact. No Terser renderChunk failure. Previously broken generateSW config replaced with injectManifest.

banned-term-scanner.evidence: Scanned all changed files (vite.config.ts, src/sw.ts, tsconfig.app.json, DragCanvas.tsx, AIAdvisor.tsx, CrmDashboard.tsx). Zero banned terms in changed files. Pre-existing violations (disruptive in IntelligenceFeedSection.tsx tooltip, component identifiers named *Dashboard) not introduced by this WO and tracked separately.

smoke-test-suite.evidence: tsc exit 0; build passes; 294 routes in App.tsx (>100 OK); critical files present (App.tsx, main.tsx, index.html, package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts); dist/sw.js exists post-build. tailwind.config.js present (skill expected .ts extension — pre-existing naming difference, not a regression).

performance-profiler.evidence: SW chunk: 49K raw / 8.71KB gzip — well within budget. No main bundle regression vs baseline (vendor-docs: 828K, index: 448K unchanged). 286 dynamic import() calls (good code splitting). SW runs off main thread — zero impact on LCP/FID/TTI. Pre-existing issues (163 unmemoized components, 42 unoptimized images) outside this WO scope.

specialist_inputs.pwa_strategy: injectManifest (not generateSW — avoids terser renderChunk hang)
specialist_inputs.prod_only_gate: disable: !isProd — SW inactive in dev, active in production builds
specialist_inputs.registration: injectRegister: null — existing manual /sw.js registration in index.html preserved
specialist_inputs.manifest: manifest: false — existing public/manifest.json used, no duplicate generated
specialist_inputs.offline_fallback: public/offline.html precached via __WB_MANIFEST (revision hash included), served via fetch catch on navigation failure
specialist_inputs.sw_output: dist/sw.js — overwrites legacy public/sw.js copy during build; correct SW with Workbox 7.3.0
ts_fixes: DragCanvas.tsx:97 — content.change (unknown) → !!content.change (boolean) prevents unknown|ReactElement type error
AIAdvisor.tsx:367 — signal.confidenceScore (number|undefined) → signal.confidenceScore ?? null (number|null) matches formatConfidence signature

cms_power_01_impact: CMS-POWER-01 build gate blocker (PWA service worker generation error) is now resolved. npm run build passes with PWA enabled. CMS-POWER-01 may now proceed with its content implementation work.
